Levels.Monophasic: Monophasic pulse shape as per stimulator setting

stimulus_intensity.Description: Stimulator intensity for single or multiple pulses (if separated by a delimiter). Note that if seperated, number of values MUST equal patter1_count.

stimulus_duration.Description: Time during which a contiguous non-zero current is applied through the coil

pattern1_count.LongName: Number of stimuli in repeating pattern
pattern1_count.Description: Total number stimuli in repeating pattern

pattern1_interval.Description: Interval from the start of the first stimulus to the start of the proceeding stimulus

pattern1_intensity.LongName: Changing stimulation intensity for multiple pulses
pattern1_intensity.Description: Stimulator intensity for multiple pulses with changing intensity  (separated by a delimiter). Note that if seperated, number of values MUST equal patter1_count.
